description:
Create a Business Continuity plan entry in Eramba GRC with the following details:

- Title: Data Center Outage - Core Operations Recovery
- Description: This business continuity plan addresses a complete data center outage affecting core business applications. Recovery procedures cover critical infrastructure including database servers, application servers, and network equipment. Recovery Time Objective is 4 hours and Recovery Point Objective is 1 hour. Key stakeholders include IT Operations, the Security Team, and Business Unit Managers. Annual testing of failover procedures is required.

Login credentials:
- URL: http://localhost:8080
- Username: admin
- Password: Admin2024!

metadata.expected_title: Data Center Outage - Core Operations Recovery
